Caption: SEM images of the anodes before (C) and after cycling (200 cycles) with electrolyte EM-0 and EM-4b in different magnification (1.000× and 5.000×).

: Composition of the surface of the anode before (C) and after (EM-0/EM-4b) cell cycling (200 cycles at 25 °C). The anode sheets were washed with dimethyl carbonate several times before analysis. It was found that Al and Si is present in different amounts due to the separator Separion. These amounts were subtracted out for a better comparison between the cells. Additionally, the amount of conducting salt was subtracted as well based on P (EM-0, LiPF6) and S (EM-4b, LiTFSI). Thereafter, the atom-% were recalibrated to 100%.
